channel.title: Comments for page "The Friday Exhibition"
channel.description: Posts in the discussion thread "The Friday Exhibition"

item.title: (no title)
item.content:encoded: Futanari Titwhore Fiasco needs to be a real band. It sounds like a heavy metal band I would be totally into, and despite how the song degrades into a mouthful of non-melodious words, the song in this story is pretty frickin METAL at first. +1 just for how insanely fun this is, Would also give it a +1 just for knowing a band called Futanare Titwhore Fiasco EXISTS in the SCP universe, tbh. LOL

item.title: (no title)
item.content:encoded: Okay, I can't be the only one who thought "Gamzee".

item.title: (no title)
item.content:encoded:
BUT ONCE YOU GET ONE, YOU’VE JUST GOT TO COLLECT THEM ALL, AM I RIGHT?

Little Misters reference or am I just looking too deep into this?

item.title: (no title)
item.content:encoded:
My favourite in the saga. Also,

You sat with Arsehole and Hiro, dutifully entering your confirmation code into the prototype art bomb.

Is this a reference? Something to do with 426 maybe?
HOOOOOOOOOOOOOOOOOOOOONK

item.title: (no title)
item.content:encoded: Oh, no.

item.title: (no title)
item.content:encoded:
And thus, shit hits the fan. Or, rather, green goo hits the dead bodies.

Not gonna lie, this is one of the most intense and effective cliffhangers I've ever read.

item.title: (no title)
item.content:encoded:
a wretched hive of scum and artistry

aaaand upvote.

The rest of it just continued to earn more and more. Eyes literally bugged out at 447 at the end.

item.title: (no title)
item.content:encoded: I literally started jumping up and down in my chair when I read that last line…

item.title: (no title)
item.content:encoded:
Damn. Really great stuff here, and that twist though. I'm sad I have to go to sleep now so I have to leave myself hanging overnight :(
+1

item.title: (no title)
item.content:encoded: 447 actually made me swear out loud.

item.title: (no title)
item.content:encoded:
I've been enjoying the hell out of this entire series. Good, good, good stuff.

Frankly, I like the coopting of certain SCPs. I like the idea that hey, guess what? That art collective that people kind of talk about but never really treat with respect? Those guys? Yeah, they created some of the worst of the worst (best of the best) SCPs. That AWCY? only really came to the Foundation's attention because of the copycats/unimaginative works, and the "real" group has done some major stuff…it feels right. It's a game changer that I'm all for.

item.title: (no title)
item.content:encoded: The ending (the twist, not so much Pico's speech) was pretty sweet, but the middle kinda drifted.

item.title: (no title)
item.content:encoded: Wow… This is awesome. And Futanari Titwhore Fiasco… Obviously the best band in existence. But are the members actually futanari or is it just a meaningless name?

item.title: (no title)
item.content:encoded:
+1

Such buildup! Can't wait to read the next piece! Oh wait, I can, RIGHT NOW! YAY.

item.title: (no title)
item.content:encoded:
He just poured SCP-447 on dead bodies.

Holy crap.

The next piece better be pretty damn good…

item.title: (no title)
item.content:encoded:
I did not see 447 coming, but it is perfect in retrospect. The song, the duplicates, The Sculpter all done very well. I hope all of the "The" guys get their rear end's kicked well.

So, in summary, and with apologies to Dr. Berggren:

Yeah.

item.title: (no title)
item.content:encoded: damn it, why is there no +1 for comments?

item.title: (no title)
item.content:encoded: However, am I right that their might end up being some extremely fucked up relationship between the snipper dude and The janitor involving the use of green slime as a way to "nuke the city" in a creative and deadly way?

item.title: (no title)
item.content:encoded: Thanks for this deep and insightful critique. I shall strive to further improve my writing based on this.

item.title: (no title)
item.content:encoded: Nah.

item.title: (no title)
item.content:encoded:
I did not see that coming. All that build up was fabulous.

Agent Green has a long day ahead. How can he hope to contain this mess?

item.title: (no title)
item.content:encoded:
OH SHIT OH FUCK OH GOD

There's too much to react to in this. I love FTF and the duplicates and just getting to see all these people who are used to dealing in weird anomalous shit, right up-close.

This gets me thinking. There are two entire Foundation agents here, and only due to significant efforts at infiltration. Most of the anart SCPs that I can think of tend to have been recovered from non-anomalous galleries it seems, if not on their own. I feel like if more anartists stuck to their own, to showings like this, the Foundation wouldn't have nearly as much info on them as they do.

item.title: (no title)
item.content:encoded: I laughed at the Banksy references, the next bit can't come sooner.

item.title: (no title)
item.content:encoded: He's not; the intermissions will make this clear.

item.title: (no title)
item.content:encoded:
My god…

Also why do I feel that this was some kind of sick and crazy attempt at wooing The Janitor over into some strange and horrifying relationship

item.title: (no title)
item.content:encoded: The guy in the balloon. The Snipper. He's Mr. Redd, isn't he?

item.title: (no title)
item.content:encoded:
Endless cravings help me please
I’ve caught laser butt disease
Raptor butts light up the trees
What if everything is bees?

How do you keep doing this? How the heck does anybody keep doing this, putting bees in things and they work?!?!? +1 for that alone.

E: These things just keep getting better and better. Randomini, how the heck do you do it?

item.title: (no title)
item.content:encoded: I was saying the other night how randomini could write pretty much anything in and make it fit in nicely, and it appears he did it again.

item.title: (no title)
item.content:encoded:
What if everything is bees?

The raptors approach an alchemist

I hate you , and I hate you all the more for the fact that these don't detract from the article at all. +1

item.title: (no title)
item.content:encoded: Amazeballs x1000. This is probably the straight-up coolest, funnest thing I've read on the site. I feel like I'm reading a dubstep music video and I love it.

item.title: (no title)
item.content:encoded:
Okay, I'm all caught up now. I'm okay with the 447 reference; I don't feel it implies that he made it himself. Maybe he found a source of it, or stole some, who knows.

I do know that despite some nitpicks I've enjoyed every one of these and will continue to do so. The Sculptors absolute failure with the duplicates really made my day.

item.title: (no title)
item.content:encoded:
hooooooooonk

Ok that was pretty funny…

Other than that meh. My issues with this piece are no different from the last, although you probably already anticipated thus. I can't comment much.

item.title: (no title)
item.content:encoded: Overall I enjoy this, but I'm getting kinda tired of having all these different SCPs explained as being made by anartists.

item.title: (no title)
item.content:encoded:
HOOOOOOOOOOOOOOOOOOONK

I want to know if anyone was expecting this.
